_readme: Edit this file to update all text and contact info across the site. No coding required. Save the file and refresh the browser to see changes.
heroDesc: No nonsense, no hidden fees. Quality used cars hand-selected for the people who live and drive in Los Angeles.
trustParagraph: We're a small dealer doing things right. Every car gets inspected, every price is the price, and we're not trying to rush you into anything. We want you to leave happy and send your friends.

reviews.text: Found the car I'd been looking for at a price I could actually work with. No back-and-forth, no upsells. Straightforward from start to finish.
reviews.author: Marcus T.

reviews.text: I was skeptical of used car lots after a bad experience elsewhere, but these guys were different. Walked me through everything and I drove off the same day.
reviews.author: Jasmine R.

reviews.text: Traded in my old Accord and got more than I expected. Clean inventory, no pressure, just good vibes. Will definitely be back.
reviews.author: Deon W.

ctaSubtext: Open 7 days · 9am to 7pm · 1234 W Rosecrans Ave, Gardena CA
footerTagline: Quality pre-owned vehicles in Gardena, CA. Serving the South Bay and greater Los Angeles.
carCtaSubtitle: Call or text us to schedule a test drive. We're in Gardena, open 7 days a week.
